name: @phrase/phrase-mcp-server
description: Use Phrase APIs from any MCP client with ready-to-use tools for Phrase Strings and Phrase TMS.
long_description: Automates localization workflows across Phrase Strings and Phrase TMS. Covers projects, jobs, locales, translation keys, branches, glossaries, and file uploads/downloads.

strings_token.title: Phrase Strings API Token
strings_token.description: Required for Strings tools. Create one at app.phrase.com → Account Settings → API Tokens.

tms_token.title: Phrase TMS API Token
tms_token.description: Required for TMS tools. Create one in your Phrase TMS account settings.

bqe_token.title: Phrase Quality Evaluator API Token
bqe_token.description: Required for Quality Evaluator (BQE) tools. Create one at app.phrase.com → Account Settings → API Tokens.

enabled_products.title: Enabled Products
enabled_products.description: Comma-separated list of products to enable: any subset of 'tms' 'strings', 'bqe'.
